---
title: "elementAt()"
description: "elementAt: emit the value at zero-based `index`, then COMPLETE. EDGE (RxJS divergence, flagged): RxJS throws ArgumentOutOfRangeError if the source completes before `index`; we COMPLETE without a value (no throw), consistent with last/find."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

elementAt: emit the value at zero-based `index`, then COMPLETE. EDGE (RxJS divergence, flagged):
RxJS throws ArgumentOutOfRangeError if the source completes before `index`; we COMPLETE without
a value (no throw), consistent with last/find.

## Import

```ts
import { elementAt } from "@graphrefly/ts/operators";
```

## Signature

```ts
function elementAt(index: number): Operator<S, S>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `index` | `number` | Missing @param index JSDoc. |

## Returns

`Operator<S, S>`
